title: Gorilla Filler 750ml - Expanding Foam Filler | Weatherproof - Ideal for Pipes, Windows, Doors (For Internal & External Use) 750ml
features: WEATHERPROOF, SEALS & FILLS: The Original Gorilla Filler, is a ready to use foam filler, quickly and easily squeeze into gaps for a secure seal

INDOOR & OUTDOOR DIY PROJECTS: The Original Gorilla Filler, a self expanding foam. Adheres to all common building materials. Ideal for filling gaps around window and door frames internal or external. Weatherproof, suitable around exterior pipes, brickwork and other gaps

QUICK, EASY TO USE: The Original Gorilla Filler, controllable hand held foam aerosol dispenser, accurate trigger control. Fill cavaties and gaps quickly and easily. Provides insulation against heat, sound and moisture.

VERSATILE, STRONG, LONG LASTING:The Original Gorilla Filler, strong, long lasting and weatherproof. Versatile use, expanding foam to fill holes, gaps and cavities, or use as an adhesive for fixing large sheet materials.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use 750ml Aerosol Expanding Foam Filler
description: The Original Gorilla Filler, is a ready to use foam filler, quickly and easily squeeze into gaps for a secure seal. Adheres to all common building materials. Ideal for filling gaps around window and door frames internal or external. Weatherproof, suitable around exterior pipes, brickwork and other cavaties. The Original Gorilla Filler, controllable hand held foam aerosol dispenser, accurate trigger control. Fill cavaties and gaps quickly and easily. Provides insulation against heat, sound and moisture. Ready to use 750ml Aerosol
